abstract: Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence.
overview:
## Return Value

An instance of the `AsyncIterator` type used to produce elements of the asynchronous sequence.

--- source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/Combine/AsyncThrowingPublisher/makeAsyncIterator() crawled: 2025-12-13T16:49:29Z --- # makeAsyncIterator() **Instance Method** Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence. ## Declaration ```swift func makeAsyncIterator() -> AsyncThrowingPublisher

.Iterator ``` ## Return Value An instance of the `AsyncIterator` type used to produce elements of the asynchronous sequence. ## Creating an iterator - **AsyncThrowingPublisher.Iterator**: The iterator that produces elements of the asynchronous publisher sequence.
